utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well you have to because maybe it is stupid .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well it is just while Monica and I were dancing to them it was ... the first time I knew that ... you were the woman I wanted to dance all my dances with .
